START_TOUR_TEXT: Welcome to the tutorial of Eurostat's Energy trade visualization tool. This guided tour will show you the main ways of interacting with the tool.
STEP0_TEXT: The map view is the default view of the tool. It shows the energy trade flows between countries. Click on a country to see detailed information regarding its energy trade.
STEP1_TEXT: The tool contains a menu for additional features. Click on the menu icon to customize the map view. Click next to learn about the menu options.
STEP2_TEXT: Use this option to change between imports and exports.
STEP3_TEXT: Use this option to change between different fuel types, coal, gas, oil, electricity/heat and biofuels.
STEP4_TEXT: Use this option to change between different sub-fuels when avalable.
STEP5_TEXT: Use this option to change between different years..
STEP6_TEXT: Use this option to change between different units when avalable.
STEP7_TEXT: Use this option to filter the countries, top 5, top 10, top 25 or all countries.
STEP8_TEXT: Whenever you see this icon, click on it to learn more. The Eurostat visualization tool for the energy trade is linked to definitions, metadata and data sets.
STEP9_TEXT: Use this option to embed the visualization in your website.
STEP10_TEXT: Use this option to share the visualization in social media or email.
STEP11_TEXT: Use this option to select French, English or German.
STEP12_TITLE: That is it for our tour.
STEP13_TEXT: If you find this visualization tool useful, please show your support by sharing it with others on X, Facebook, email, and LinkedIn. Thank you!
